Recovery 61 • Sleep 53 • Strain 1%

Read
Given the shorter night, reserve is uneven: some internal signals look resilient, but the day is not fully restored. It favors controlled consistency, with muscle retention depending more on adequate protein and measured effort than extra activity.

Steady reserve.
